Headline: #53 Pulaski buses Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Maypole
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near Pulaski/Maypole.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Pulaski, Madison, Cicero, Chicago, Pulaski and over the regular route due to street blockage near Pulaski/Maypole.

Allow extra travel time.
